parties.name: NUGER, JUSTIN DANIEL 955 PINE STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Justin Nuger in Propria Persona.

The Court explained that these petitions are for situations in which there is no official record anywhere, noted that Mr. Nuger has an official record from France and asked why he filed the petition. Mr. Nuger stated that he filed the petition because these laws are very volatile, that he is worried should the marriage be invalidated in France for whatever reason and that he wants to have the marriage valid in California where they are residing. Mr. Nuger also stated that based on the history around the world, he wants some protection for him and his partner, that he spoke with a couple of Attorneys and that the Attorneys are in the same position as the Court. The Court noted that the allegation under #3 in the petition which states that no official record exist is inaccurate, stated that if something happens, they can get married here and that if any question about authenticity comes up, then they can file this type of petition. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is taken under submission

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
